schema.title: PSUR RG-PSUR-001
schema.description: Authoritative JSON Schema for Periodic Safety Update Reports conforming to RG-PSUR-001. Covers 13 sections (A-M) per EU MDR Article 86, MDCG 2022-21, MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev 4, and ISO 14971:2019. This schema defines the canonical data contract between PSUR content generation agents and the Template-Clone-and-Fill renderer.

form.description: Document metadata identifying the form template and revision.

form_title.description: Full title: Periodic Safety Update Report (PSUR).

product_or_product_family.description: Device trade name or product family name. Populates header and cover page.

infocard_number.description: Company infocard reference number for document control.

psur_cover_page.description: PSUR cover page information per MDCG 2022-21 Section 3.

company_name.description: Legal entity name of the manufacturer.

manufacturer_srn.description: EUDAMED Single Registration Number (SRN) of the manufacturer.

authorized_representative.description: EU Authorized Representative per MDR Article 11.

certificate_number.description: EC/EU Certificate number issued by the Notified Body.

name.description: Notified Body name (e.g., BSI, TÜV SÜD, SGS).

psur_available_within_3_working_days.description: MDR Article 86(2): PSUR available to competent authorities upon request within 3 working days.

start_date.description: ISO 8601 date: Start of the surveillance period.

end_date.description: ISO 8601 date: End of the surveillance period.

psur_cadence.description: MDR Article 86(1): Annual for Class III/implantable, biennial for Class IIa/IIb, quinquennial for Class I.

sections.description: All 13 PSUR sections A through M per RG-PSUR-001 and MDCG 2022-21.

A_executive_summary.description: Section A: Executive Summary. Overview of previous PSUR actions, NB review status, period changes, and benefit-risk conclusion. Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.1.

actions_and_status_from_previous_report.description: Narrative describing actions identified in the previous PSUR and their current status.

impact_on_comparability.description: Assessment of how the period change affects trend analysis and period-over-period comparison.

benefit_risk_assessment_conclusion.description: Per MDR Article 86(1)(d) and MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.1.4.

B_scope_and_device_description.description: Section B: Scope and Device Description. Device identification, classification, timeline, description, grouping. Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.2.

product_name.description: Device trade name or product family name.

implantable_device.description: MDR Annex VIII Rule 8 classification factor.

device_classification.description: Regulatory classification per MDR Annex VIII, UKCA requirements, and FDA 21 CFR 860.

eu_mdr_classification.description: EU MDR risk class per Annex VIII.

psur_obligation_status_assessment.description: Assessment of whether PSUR obligation continues per MDR Article 86.

device_description_and_information.description: Device description per MDR Annex II Section 1.1.

basic_udi_di_rows.description: One row per Basic UDI-DI within scope of this PSUR.

associated_documents.description: PMS Plan, CER, PMCF Plan, and other referenced documents.

complete_listing_reference.description: Reference to where the full catalog/model number list can be found.

device_grouping_information.description: Justification for device grouping per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.2.5.

C_volume_of_sales_and_population_exposur.description: Section C: Volume of Sales and Estimated Population Exposure. Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.3 and MDR Annex III Section 1.1(a).

criteria_used_for_sales_data.description: Which counting methodology is used. Multiple may apply.

table_1_sales_by_region.description: Table 1: Annual/Biennial number of devices sold by geographic region.

date_ranges.description: Column headers for preceding and current periods.

region.description: Geographic region (EEA+TR+XI, Australia, Brazil, Canada, China, Japan, UK, United States, Rest of World, Worldwide).

preceding_12_month_periods.description: Units sold in each preceding 12-month period.

current_data_collection_period.description: Units sold in the current data collection period.

percent_of_global_sales.description: Percentage of worldwide sales for this region.

narrative_analysis.description: Narrative analysis of sales trends, regional distribution, and year-over-year changes.

size_and_characteristics_of_population_u.description: Population exposure estimate per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.3.2.

D_information_on_serious_incidents.description: Section D: Information on Serious Incidents. Per MDR Article 87, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.4, IMDRF Annex A (Medical Device Problem) and Annex C (Investigation).

imdrf_code_and_term.description: IMDRF Annex A/C code and term.

table_2_serious_incidents_by_imdrf_annex.description: Table 2: Serious incidents coded by IMDRF Annex A (Medical Device Problem).

imdrf_code_and_term.description: IMDRF Annex A/C code and term.

table_3_serious_incidents_by_imdrf_annex.description: Table 3: Serious incidents coded by IMDRF Annex C (Cause Investigation).

table_4_health_impact_by_investigation_c.description: Table 4: Health impact by IMDRF Annex F.

E_customer_feedback.description: Section E: Customer Feedback (non-complaint). Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.5.

F_product_complaint_types_counts_and_rat.description: Section F: Product Complaint Types, Counts, and Rates. Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.6 and ISO 14971:2019 Clause 10.2.

method_description_and_justification.description: Methodology for calculating complaint rates (numerator/denominator definitions, exclusion criteria).

commentary_context_for_exceedances.description: Justification and context if any complaint rate exceeds the RACT threshold.

table_7_complaint_rate_and_count.description: Table 7: Complaint rate by harm and medical device problem.

medical_device_problem.description: IMDRF Annex A code and term (e.g., 'Foreign Material (A1201)').

max_expected_rate_of_occurrence_from_rac.description: Threshold from Risk Assessment and Control Table (RACT) per ISO 14971.

G_information_from_trend_reporting.description: Section G: Trend Reporting. SPC control chart analysis per MDR Article 88, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.7, and ISO 13485:2016 Clause 8.2.1.

graph_reference.description: Reference to the control chart figure.

breaches_commentary_and_actions.description: Commentary on any UCL breaches and actions taken.

statement_if_not_applicable.description: N/A statement if no trend reports were submitted.

H_information_from_fsca.description: Section H: Field Safety Corrective Actions. Per MDR Article 83, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.8.

I_corrective_and_preventive_actions.description: Section I: CAPA. Per ISO 13485:2016 Clause 8.5.2/8.5.3, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.9.

J_scientific_literature_review.description: Section J: Scientific Literature Review. Per MDR Annex XIV Part A, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.10, MEDDEV 2.7/1 Rev 4.

literature_search_methodology.description: Search strategy: databases, keywords, inclusion/exclusion criteria.

K_review_of_external_databases_and_regis.description: Section K: External Database and Registry Review. Per MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.11 (MAUDE, BfArM, MHRA, Swissmedic, TGA DAEN).

L_pmcf.description: Section L: Post-Market Clinical Follow-Up. Per MDR Article 61, Annex XIV Part B, MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.12.

M_findings_and_conclusions.description: Section M: Findings and Conclusions. Overall benefit-risk determination, action items. Per MDR Article 86(1)(d), MDCG 2022-21 Section 4.13.

benefit_risk_profile_conclusion.description: Narrative conclusion on whether the benefit-risk profile has been adversely impacted.

actions_taken_or_planned.description: 9 action checkboxes with optional detail narrative.

overall_performance_conclusion.description: Final narrative conclusion on device performance and safety.

_statistics.description: Pre-computed statistics from the DataHarmonizer and StatisticalAnalyzer agents. Used by the renderer for table population and chart generation. Not part of the regulatory content.

complaints_by_imdrf.description: Complaint count keyed by IMDRF Annex A code.

complaints_by_harm.description: Complaint count keyed by IMDRF Annex F harm category.

trend_analysis.description: SPC (Statistical Process Control) analysis per ISO 13485:2016 Clause 8.2.1.
